title: Colt in the Hand of the Devil
original_title: Una colt, in pugno al diavolo
overview: Pat Scotty is hired to eliminate a gang of Mexican bandits led by El Condor. Scotty craftily earns the trust of the bandits, enabling him to trap them all, but in the meantime, genuine friendship and respect have developed between him and El Condor.

trailers.title: THE DEVIL WAS AN ANGEL - TRAILER
